name: setGameScore
description: Use this method to set the score of the specified user in a game message. On success, if the message is not an inline message, the Message

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Pass True if the high score is allowed to decrease. This can be useful when fixing mistakes or banning cheaters.

parameters.name: disable_edit_message
parameters.description: Pass True if the game message should not be automatically edited to include the current scoreboard

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Unique identifier for the target chat.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Identifier of the sent message.

parameters.name: inline_message_id
parameters.description: Required if chat_id and message_id are not specified. Identifier of the inline message.
